sources.name: Haiti
sources.notes: Credit for the initial baseline definitions derived from Haiti data. dahash does not depend on Haiti at runtime.

sources.name: Hashcat example hashes
sources.notes: Official Hashcat examples used for mode metadata and sample hashes.

sources.name: John the Ripper jumbo run helpers
sources.notes: Reference for explicit file-to-hash conversion helpers used by dahash --file mode. dahash does not depend on John at runtime unless the user invokes a configured helper.

sources.name: hashID reference data
sources.notes: Reference-only baseline used to fill hash types absent from initial dahash data.

sources.name: Name-That-Hash reference data
sources.notes: Reference-only baseline used to fill hash types absent from initial dahash data.
